title: Resource Extractor
description: Extracts resources out of Minecraft and mods to create a template resourcepack for creators.
body:
Requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
\
\
Extracts resources out of Minecraft and mods to create a template resourcepack for creators.

![Mod Menu, click the "Extract Resources" button next to the configure button](https://i.imgur.com/8HVwaID.png)
